# teams app rsc list

List RSC permissions for an app

## Usage

```
teams app rsc list <teamsAppId>
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description | Required |
|----------|-------------|----------|
| `teamsAppId` | Teams app ID | Yes |

## Options

| Option | Description |
|--------|-------------|
| `--json` | [OPTIONAL] Output as JSON |
<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
